channel.title: Machine Learning on jonnyshao
channel.description: Recent content in Machine Learning on jonnyshao

item.title: Gradient Descent
item.description: 1. review in previous learning, we have to solve the following optimization problem: $\theta = arg\min\limits_{\theta}L(\theta)$, $L$: loss function, $\theta$: parameters suppose $\theta$ is a set of 2 variables {${\theta_1, \theta_2}$} Randomly start at $\theta^0= \begin{bmatrix} \theta_1^{0} \ \theta_2^{0} \end{bmatrix}$ compute the gradient at $\theta^0$: $\Delta L(\theta)=\begin{bmatrix} \frac{\partial L(\theta_1)}{\partial \theta_1} \ \frac{\partial L(\theta_2)}{\partial \theta_2} \end{bmatrix}$ $\rightarrow \theta_1=\theta_0-\eta \Delta L(\theta^0)$

item.title: Regression-error
item.description: Bias v.s. Variance error due to bias and variance ![xxac](/img/截屏2020-10-19 下午7.10.54.png) 根据实验结果和讨论有： simpler model， smaller variance，larger bias more complex model, large variance, smaller bias ![xxxa](/img/截屏2020-10-19 下午7.11.53.png) large variance $\rightarrow$ overfitting large bias $\rightarrow$ underfitting solution to error how to know the error is more due to bias or variance? if error on training data is large $\rightarrow$ bias is large, underfitting if error on testing data is large $\rightarrow$ variance is large, overfitting large bias

item.title: Regression-case study
item.description: step 1 ： model step2： goodness training data: $(x_1, \hat y_1), (x_2, \hat y_2) … (x_{10}, \hat y_{10})$ $y = b + w \cdot x_{cp}$ we set a Loss function $L$: input: a function output: how bad it is $L(f)=L(w,b)=\sum\limits_{n=1}^{10}(\hat y_n-(b+w\cdot x_{cp}^{n}))^2$ $(\hat y_n-(b+wx_{cp}^{n}))^2$ : estimation error step 3: best function pick the best function where : $w^, b^ = arg min_{w,b}L(w,b)$ we can use gradient descent, only if $L$ is differentiable

item.title: Introduction to ML
item.description: model or function set Linear Model Non-linear Model deep-learning neural networks SVM, K-NN, Decision tree, e.t.c Supervised Learning（监督学习）: label, input, output regression（回归） classification（分类） binary classification multi-class classification semi-supervised Learning（半监督学习）: partly labeled data, partly unlabeled data Unsupervised Learning（非监督学习）: unlabeled data Structured Learning（结构化学习）: like GAN, get a structured object other frontier anomaly detection（异常检测）: how can AI know that it don’t know transfer learning（迁移学习）: what can irrelevant data contribute to the results meta learning（元机器学习）: learn to learn life-long learning（持续学习）: continual learning Reinforcement Learning（强化学习） : learning from critics explainable AI（可解释性）: reason for AI results adversarial attack（对抗攻击）: how to address malicious attack to AI network compression（网络剪枝）: how to prune large model
